scripts.start: SITE_URL=http://localhost:8080 npm run build && concurrently "browser-sync start --server www --files 'www/**/*' --no-notify --port 8080" "chokidar 'src/**/*' -c 'SITE_URL=http://localhost:8080 npm run build'"
scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:html
